notes: Real-repository smoke corpus (internal/corpus). Five repos chosen to cover the historical first-contact bug classes (non-source assets, symlinked layouts, JSON fixtures) plus language spread: Go (also the future typeresolve proving ground), Python, Ruby, TypeScript, JavaScript+JSON. Refs pin RELEASE TAGS; sha is empty on onboarding — after the first green CI run, copy each recorded head_sha from the corpus-report artifact into the matching sha field to tighten the pin. Adding a repository is a data change here, never a code change.

entries.name: cobra
entries.notes: Go CLI framework; the typeresolve (v0.2.0) acceptance target.

entries.name: flask
entries.notes: Python package; docs, JSON, and mixed non-source assets.

entries.name: express
entries.notes: JavaScript + many JSON fixtures and markdown — the malformed-asset bug class.
